critic_notes: Section 4.2 (Kommunikation und Wissen) has eight solid multi-correct questions covering Kommunikation, Managementberichte, Klassifikationsschema, Dokumentation (Pflicht, drei Arten, formale Anforderungen, schutzbeduerftige Dokumentationen) und externe Informationsquellen. All quote fragments (including the soft-hyphen artifacts 'Informationssicher heit', 'un abdingbar', 'Ent scheidungen') are verbatim substrings of the normalized source. Correct answers map directly onto source sentences; distractors (only in Planung, rein technische Dokumente, Marketingunterlagen, Papierpflicht, einmalige Erstellung, freie Zugaenglichkeit, reine Herstellerquellen) are unambiguously wrong. Topic methodik fits (communication/documentation governance), difficulty basis fits (one-step paraphrases), pages 22-24 are within range, schema null/null correct.
